aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical elements for strong search optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews.
Optimize website content with targeted local keywords (e.g., Arvada, CO).
Enhance meta tags and descriptions for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: Google Business Profile (GBP) not claimed or optimized.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business lacks a claimed and optimized GBP, which is crucial for local search visibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web.
action_items: Audit and update NAP citations on major directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages).
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms.
Claim and verify business listings on relevant local directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and optimization for voice search.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local customers searching for heating and cooling services in Arvada, CO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add location-specific content and FAQs targeting common customer queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish blog posts or guides on HVAC maintenance and repair to establish industry authority.
